name: magic-ripple-button
title: Ripple Button
author: Magic UI
description: Adds bounded pointer and keyboard ripple feedback to a native button.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils and imported the colocated stylesheet.
Centered keyboard-triggered ripples, defaulted the control to type button, added a visible focus treatment, and used the scoped animation class.
Extracted the Ripple Button keyframes into a colocated stylesheet, scoped the animation identifier, and added a reduced-motion override.

license.scope: apps/www/registry/magicui/ripple-button.tsx, the Ripple Button registry CSS in apps/www/registry/registry-ui.ts, and apps/www/registry/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed the bundled utility import, connected the extracted CSS, centered keyboard activation, set the safe button type, and added visible focus styling.
modifications.reason: Keep the native control safe inside forms and make its feedback usable without pointer coordinates.

modifications.change: Extracted and scoped the upstream registry keyframes, then added a reduced-motion rule.
modifications.reason: Ship the complete animation with exact provenance while preventing motion when the user opts out.
